chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.sendHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
chat.welcomeMessage:
Hello {{name}}! I'm your AdventureWorks AI assistant. I can help you:

• Track your orders and get details
• Get personalised product recommendations
• Check real-time inventory availability
• Read product reviews and ratings
• Find complementary products

What can I help you with today?
chat.errorMessage: Sorry, I encountered an error processing your request. Please try again.

suggestedQuestions.recommendations: What products would you recommend for me?
suggestedQuestions.productReviews: What are people saying about product {{productId}}?
suggestedQuestions.recentOrders: Tell me about my recent orders
